endpoints.name: Tell Nexmo if your SMS message was successful
endpoints.description: Send a Conversion API request with information about the SMS message identified by `message-id`. Nexmo uses your conversion data and internal information about `message-id` to help improve our routing of messages in the future.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEXMO_API_KEY}} with your NEXMO API KEY.

endpoints.name: Tell Nexmo if your voice call was successful
endpoints.description: Send a Conversion API request with information about the Call or Text-To-Speech identified by `message-id`. Nexmo uses your conversion data and internal information about `message-id` to help improve our routing of messages in the future.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEXMO_API_KEY}} with your NEXMO API KEY.
